title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 2 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 2 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 2 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 02/04/2026
Iron ore futures showed a stronger trend in the morning session today but weakened in the afternoon. The main contract I2605eventually closed at 805 yuan/ton, down 1.29% from the previous trading session. Spot prices fell by approximately 3-7 yuan compared to the previous day.
